name: python3-filedepot
title: python3-filedepot
summary: file storage made easy for the Web World (Python 3)
description:
file storage made easy for the Web World (Python 3)
This package contains DEPOT, a framework for easily storing and serving files
in web applications.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-filedepot because file storage made easy for the Web World (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-filedepot as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-filedepot with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-filedepot --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
